title: Snappy Greek Lamb Souvlaki
description: A vibrant and flavorful Greek dish made with lean lamb, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of dry sherry.
instructions: Place lamb skewers in a large bowl and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and oregano.
'Tadka' the onion and red pepper in olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the red tomato to the pan and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the sherry to the pan and simmer for 1 minute.
Thread the lamb, onion, pepper, and tomato onto skewers.
Grill the skewers over medium-high heat for 4 minutes, turning occasionally.
Brush the skewers with red wine vinegar and olive oil during the last minute of cooking.
Sprinkle the skewers with parsley and serve with lemon juice.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Slice the skewers and serve warm.
